changelog: EMERGENCY ROLLBACK #2: removed installMainLooperResilience entirely. The re-entrant Looper.loop() pattern was a likely cause of the recent app-startup crashes on Google TV / Fire OS 12+, and was also blackholing crash reports (none of v1.43.83+ uploaded). Standard Android crash dialog will now fire normally for unknown crashes.
Bundled-asset Coil mapper still disabled (v1.43.87 rollback retained).
If your app has been stuck in a crash loop, force-stop the app once after this update installs.
